lines.gurmukhi: ਕਵਿ ਕਲੵ ਠਕੁਰ ਹਰਦਾਸ ਤਨੇ ਗੁਰ ਰਾਮਦਾਸ ਸਰ ਅਭਰ ਭਰੇ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: kav kalay tthakur haradaas tane gur raamadaas sar abhar bhare |3|
lines.english: So speaks KALL the poet: Guru Raam Daas, the son of Har Daas, fills the empty pools to overflowing. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਗੁਰਿ ਦਯਾਲਿ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਦ੍ਰਿੜੑਾਯਾ ਤਿਸੁ ਪ੍ਰਸਾਦਿ ਵਸਿ ਪੰਚ ਕਰੇ ॥
lines.translit: satagur dayaal har naam drirraayaa tis prasaad vas panch kare |
lines.english: The Merciful True Guru has implanted the Lord's Name within me, and by His Grace, I have overpowered the five thieves.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਨਭਉ ਉਨਮਾਨਿ ਅਕਲ ਲਿਵ ਲਾਗੀ ਪਾਰਸੁ ਭੇਟਿਆ ਸਹਜ ਘਰੇ ॥
lines.translit: anbhau unamaan akal liv laagee paaras bhettiaa sehaj ghare |
lines.english: With intuitive detachment, He is lovingly attuned to the Fearless, Unmanifest Lord; He met with Guru Amar Daas, the Philosopher's Stone, within his own home.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਗੁਰ ਪਰਸਾਦਿ ਪਰਮ ਪਦੁ ਪਾਯਾ ਭਗਤਿ ਭਾਇ ਭੰਡਾਰ ਭਰੇ ॥
lines.translit: satagur parasaad param pad paayaa bhagat bhaae bhanddaar bhare |
lines.english: By the Grace of the True Guru, He attained the supreme status; He is overflowing with the treasures of loving devotion.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੇਟਿਆ ਜਨਮਾਂਤੁ ਮਰਣ ਭਉ ਭਾਗਾ ਚਿਤੁ ਲਾਗਾ ਸੰਤੋਖ ਸਰੇ ॥
lines.translit: mettiaa janamaant maran bhau bhaagaa chit laagaa santokh sare |
lines.english: He was released from reincarnation, and the fear of death was taken away. His consciousness is attached to the Lord, the Ocean of contentment.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਵਿ ਕਲੵ ਠਕੁਰ ਹਰਦਾਸ ਤਨੇ ਗੁਰ ਰਾਮਦਾਸ ਸਰ ਅਭਰ ਭਰੇ ॥੪॥
lines.translit: kav kalay tthakur haradaas tane gur raamadaas sar abhar bhare |4|
lines.english: So speaks KALL the poet: Guru Raam Daas, the son of Har Daas, fills the empty pools to overflowing. ||4||

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਭਰ ਭਰੇ ਪਾਯਉ ਅਪਾਰੁ ਰਿਦ ਅੰਤਰਿ ਧਾਰਿਓ ॥
lines.translit: abhar bhare paayau apaar rid antar dhaario |
lines.english: He fills the empty to overflowing; He has enshrined the Infinite within His heart.

lines.gurmukhi: ਦੁਖ ਭੰਜਨੁ ਆਤਮ ਪ੍ਰਬੋਧੁ ਮਨਿ ਤਤੁ ਬੀਚਾਰਿਓ ॥
lines.translit: dukh bhanjan aatam prabodh man tat beechaario |
lines.english: Within His mind, He contemplates the essence of reality, the Destroyer of pain, the Enlightener of the soul.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਦਾ ਚਾਇ ਹਰਿ ਭਾਇ ਪ੍ਰੇਮ ਰਸੁ ਆਪੇ ਜਾਣਇ ॥
lines.translit: sadaa chaae har bhaae prem ras aape jaane |
lines.english: He yearns for the Lord's Love forever; He Himself knows the sublime essence of this Love.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਪ੍ਰਸਾਦਿ ਅੰਗਦ ਸੁਮਤਿ ਗੁਰਿ ਅਮਰਿ ਅਮਰੁ ਵਰਤਾਇਓ ॥
lines.translit: naanak prasaad angad sumat gur amar amar varataaeo |
lines.english: By the Grace of Guru Nanak, and the sublime teachings of Guru Angad, Guru Amar Daas broadcast the Lord's Command.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਗੁਰ ਕੈ ਪਰਸਾਦਿ ਸਹਜ ਸੇਤੀ ਰੰਗੁ ਮਾਣਇ ॥
lines.translit: satagur kai parasaad sehaj setee rang maane |
lines.english: By the Grace of the True Guru, He intuitively enjoys this Love.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਰਾਮਦਾਸ ਕਲੵੁਚਰੈ ਤੈਂ ਅਟਲ ਅਮਰ ਪਦੁ ਪਾਇਓ ॥੫॥
lines.translit: gur raamadaas kalayucharai tain attal amar pad paaeo |5|
lines.english: So speaks KALL: O Guru Raam Daas, You have attained the status of eternal and imperishable dignity. ||5||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਿਲਤ ਸਾਂਤਿ ਉਪਜੈ ਦੁਰਤੁ ਦੂਰੰਤਰਿ ਨਾਸੈ ॥
lines.translit: milat saant upajai durat doorantar naasai |
lines.english: Meeting with You, a tranquil peace wells up, and sins run far away.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੰਤੋਖ ਸਰੋਵਰਿ ਬਸੈ ਅਮਿਅ ਰਸੁ ਰਸਨ ਪ੍ਰਕਾਸੈ ॥
lines.translit: santokh sarovar basai amia ras rasan prakaasai |
lines.english: You abide in the pool of contentment; Your tongue reveals the Ambrosial Essence.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੁਖ ਸਾਗਰੁ ਪਾਇਅਉ ਦਿੰਤੁ ਹਰਿ ਮਗਿ ਨ ਹੁਟੈ ॥
lines.translit: sukh saagar paaeaau dint har mag na huttai |
lines.english: You have attained the Ocean of peace, and You never grow tired on the Lord's path.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੰਜਮੁ ਸਤੁ ਸੰਤੋਖੁ ਸੀਲ ਸੰਨਾਹੁ ਮਫੁਟੈ ॥
lines.translit: sanjam sat santokh seel sanaahu mafuttai |
lines.english: The armor of self-restraint, truth, contentment and humility can never be pierced.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿਗੁਰੁ ਪ੍ਰਮਾਣੁ ਬਿਧ ਨੈ ਸਿਰਿਉ ਜਗਿ ਜਸ ਤੂਰੁ ਬਜਾਇਅਉ ॥
lines.translit: satigur pramaan bidh nai siriau jag jas toor bajaaeaau |
lines.english: The Creator Lord certified the True Guru, and now the world blows the trumpet of His Praises.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਗੁ ਜਿਤਉ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਪ੍ਰਮਾਣਿ ਮਨਿ ਏਕੁ ਧਿਆਯਉ ॥
lines.translit: jag jitau satigur pramaan man ek dhiaayau |
lines.english: O certified True Guru, You have conquered the world; You meditate single-mindedly on the One Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਰਾਮਦਾਸ ਕਲੵੁਚਰੈ ਤੈ ਅਭੈ ਅਮਰ ਪਦੁ ਪਾਇਅਉ ॥੬॥
lines.translit: gur raamadaas kalayucharai tai abhai amar pad paaeaau |6|
lines.english: So speaks KALL: O Guru Raam Daas, You have attained the state of fearless immortality. ||6||

lines.gurmukhi: ਧਨਿ ਧਨਿ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਅਮਰਦਾਸੁ ਜਿਨਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਦ੍ਰਿੜਾਯਉ ॥
lines.translit: dhan dhan satigur amaradaas jin naam drirraayau |
lines.english: Blessed, blessed is Guru Amar Daas, the True Guru, who implanted the Naam, the Name of the Lord, deep within.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਵ ਨਿਧਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਨਿਧਾਨੁ ਰਿਧਿ ਸਿਧਿ ਤਾ ਕੀ ਦਾਸੀ ॥
lines.translit: nav nidh naam nidhaan ridh sidh taa kee daasee |
lines.english: The Naam is the wealth of the nine treasures; prosperity and supernatural spiritual powers are His slaves.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਹਜ ਸਰੋਵਰੁ ਮਿਲਿਓ ਪੁਰਖੁ ਭੇਟਿਓ ਅਬਿਨਾਸੀ ॥
lines.translit: sehaj sarovar milio purakh bhettio abinaasee |
lines.english: He is blessed with the ocean of intuitive wisdom; He has met with the Imperishable Lord God.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਰਾਮਦਾਸ ਕਲੵੁਚਰੈ ਤੈ ਹਰਿ ਪ੍ਰੇਮ ਪਦਾਰਥੁ ਪਾਇਅਉ ॥੭॥
lines.translit: gur raamadaas kalayucharai tai har prem padaarath paaeaau |7|
lines.english: So speaks KALL: O Guru Raam Daas, You have obtained the wealth of the Lord's Love. ||7||

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਦਿ ਲੇ ਭਗਤ ਜਿਤੁ ਲਗਿ ਤਰੇ ਸੋ ਗੁਰਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਦ੍ਰਿੜਾਇਅਉ ॥
lines.translit: aad le bhagat jit lag tare so gur naam drirraaeaau |
lines.english: The Guru has implanted the Naam deep within; attached to the Naam, the devotees have been carried across since ancient times.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪ੍ਰੇਮ ਭਗਤਿ ਪਰਵਾਹ ਪ੍ਰੀਤਿ ਪੁਬਲੀ ਨ ਹੁਟਇ ॥
lines.translit: prem bhagat paravaah preet pubalee na hutte |
lines.english: The flow of loving devotion and primal love does not stop.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਸਬਦੁ ਅਥਾਹੁ ਅਮਿਅ ਧਾਰਾ ਰਸੁ ਗੁਟਇ ॥
lines.translit: satigur sabad athaahu amia dhaaraa ras gutte |
lines.english: The True Guru drinks in the stream of nectar, the sublime essence of the Shabad, the Infinite Word of God.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਜੋਨੀ ਸੰਭਵਿਅਉ ਜਗਤੁ ਗੁਰ ਬਚਨਿ ਤਰਾਯਉ ॥
lines.translit: aajonee sanbhaviaau jagat gur bachan taraayau |
lines.english: The Guru is the Embodiment of the Unborn, Self-illumined Lord; by the Word of His Teachings, the Guru carries the world across.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਤਿ ਮਾਤਾ ਸੰਤੋਖੁ ਪਿਤਾ ਸਰਿ ਸਹਜ ਸਮਾਯਉ ॥
lines.translit: mat maataa santokh pitaa sar sehaj samaayau |
lines.english: Wisdom is His mother, and contentment is His father; He is absorbed in the ocean of intuitive peace and poise.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਬਿਗਤ ਅਗੋਚਰੁ ਅਪਰਪਰੁ ਮਨਿ ਗੁਰਸਬਦੁ ਵਸਾਇਅਉ ॥
lines.translit: abigat agochar aparapar man gurasabad vasaaeaau |
lines.english: Within His mind, the Guru has enshrined the Shabad, the Word of the Unseen, Unfathomable, Infinite Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਰਾਮਦਾਸ ਕਲੵੁਚਰੈ ਤੈ ਜਗਤ ਉਧਾਰਣੁ ਪਾਇਅਉ ॥੮॥
lines.translit: gur raamadaas kalayucharai tai jagat udhaaran paaeaau |8|
lines.english: So speaks KALL: O Guru Raam Daas, You have attained the Lord, the Saving Grace of the world. ||8||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਗਤ ਉਧਾਰਣੁ ਨਵ ਨਿਧਾਨੁ ਭਗਤਹ ਭਵ ਤਾਰਣੁ ॥
lines.translit: jagat udhaaran nav nidhaan bhagatah bhav taaran |
lines.english: The Saving Grace of the world, the nine treasures, carries the devotees across the world-ocean.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅੰਮ੍ਰਿਤ ਬੂੰਦ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਬਿਸੁ ਕੀ ਬਿਖੈ ਨਿਵਾਰਣੁ ॥
lines.translit: amrit boond har naam bis kee bikhai nivaaran |
lines.english: The Drop of Ambrosial Nectar, the Lord's Name, is the antidote to the poison of sin.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਹਜ ਤਰੋਵਰ ਫਲਿਓ ਗਿਆਨ ਅੰਮ੍ਰਿਤ ਫਲ ਲਾਗੇ ॥
lines.translit: sehaj tarovar falio giaan amrit fal laage |
lines.english: The tree of intuitive peace and poise blossoms and bears the ambrosial fruit of spiritual wisdom.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਪ੍ਰਸਾਦਿ ਪਾਈਅਹਿ ਧੰਨਿ ਤੇ ਜਨ ਬਡਭਾਗੇ ॥
lines.translit: gur prasaad paaeeeh dhan te jan baddabhaage |
lines.english: Blessed are those fortunate people who receive it, by Guru's Grace.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੇ ਮੁਕਤੇ ਭਏ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਸਬਦਿ ਮਨਿ ਗੁਰ ਪਰਚਾ ਪਾਇਅਉ ॥
lines.translit: te mukate bhe satigur sabad man gur parachaa paaeaau |
lines.english: They are liberated through the Shabad, the Word of the True Guru; their minds are filled with the Guru's Wisdom.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਰਾਮਦਾਸ ਕਲੵੁਚਰੈ ਤੈ ਸਬਦ ਨੀਸਾਨੁ ਬਜਾਇਅਉ ॥੯॥
lines.translit: gur raamadaas kalayucharai tai sabad neesaan bajaaeaau |9|
lines.english: So speaks KALL: O Guru Raam Daas, You beat the drum of the Shabad. ||9||
